full_prompt: Design a monolithic clear cast acrylic (PMMA) bench-scale packed-bed adsorption column for an acrylic adsorption-column benchmark task focused on per- and polyfluoroalkyl substance (PFAS) removal from mine-impacted water at 10 L/min throughput. The column is a single-piece cast-acrylic cylindrical body with integral top and bottom flanges (no multi-part assembly, no adhesives in the pressure boundary), machined to accept sanitary Tri-Clamp end caps that are outside this CAD prompt. Geometry: ID 150 mm, wall thickness 10 mm, overall cylinder length 900 mm including integral top and bottom flanges of 200 mm OD x 15 mm thick with a 12-hole bolt circle on 175 mm PCD (each hole diameter 10 mm), three sampling ports at 225, 450, and 675 mm from the inlet, each port is an integral 1/4-inch NPT female boss 15 mm OD x 18 mm long extending radially from the cylinder. Internal packing volume 15.9 L is filled with granular activated carbon (GAC) pellets (bulk density 450 kg/m^3, porosity 0.42, particle diameter 1.5 mm) but the packing itself is not part of the CAD body. Bounding envelope 220 mm x 220 mm x 930 mm. Material cast acrylic (PMMA) with Young's modulus 3.3 GPa, Poisson's ratio 0.35, density 1180 kg/m^3, yield (tensile) 72 MPa, ultimate 72 MPa (brittle), glass transition 105 C, max operating temperature 70 C. Design basis: operating flow 10 L/min upflow, water at 15 C density 999 kg/m^3 viscosity 1.14e-3 Pa-s; Ergun-equation pressure drop across 600 mm GAC bed estimated 18 kPa at 10 L/min; maximum allowable operating pressure (MAOP) 200 kPa gauge. Three load cases. Load Case 1 (MAOP proof): 300 kPa gauge internal pressure at 20 C (1.5x MAOP, 10-minute hold) with all ports and flanges sealed. Load Case 2 (operating + thermal): 200 kPa gauge internal at 30 C (warm mine water) plus vertical self-weight of column plus 16 kg of water plus 7 kg of wet GAC, top flange fixed vertically. Load Case 3 (impact / backwash surge): internal pressure step from 0 to 250 kPa in 0.5 s during a backwash flow reversal, evaluated quasi-statically. Pass/fail: (R1) under LC1 proof, peak tensile stress anywhere in the acrylic body must not exceed 18 MPa (brittle material safety factor 4.0 on tensile ultimate per ASME BPVC Section X non-metallic appendix guidance conservatively applied to PMMA); (R2) under LC2 operating, peak stress must not exceed 12 MPa (SF 6.0 for long-duration creep life of PMMA over 1000 h at 30 C); (R3) under LC3 backwash surge, peak stress must not exceed 18 MPa; (R4) a CFD analysis of LC2 steady flow must show uniform superficial velocity at the bed face with max/mean ratio at most 1.15 and return a total pressure drop no greater than 25 kPa (leaving headroom over the 18 kPa Ergun estimate); (R5) a linear buckling eigenvalue analysis under -100 kPa gauge (accidental vacuum) must yield a first-mode factor of at least 4.0 (brittle material with higher buckling SF); (R6) column body mass must not exceed 5.5 kg; (R7) the column wall must remain transparent (no geometry feature thicker than 20 mm in any flow-visualization section) to meet the benchmark judge-observation requirement. Vibration, radiation, and thermal analyses beyond LC2 are not required. Deliver STEP AP242 geometry plus report.
short_prompt:
Design a monolithic cast-acrylic (PMMA) bench-scale packed-bed adsorption column for a 10 L/min PFAS-removal benchmark on mine-impacted water, single-piece body with integral top and bottom flanges (12-hole x 10 mm on 175 PCD) accepting external sanitary Tri-Clamp end caps (out of scope), and three integral 1/4"-NPT sampling ports at 225 / 450 / 675 mm from the inlet. Column holds ~15.9 L of GAC pellets (bulk density 450 kg/m^3, dp 1.5 mm, porosity 0.42) but the packing itself is not in the CAD body. Mass <= 5.5 kg. Transparency: no section thicker than 20 mm in flow-visualization zones. PMMA allowables per ASME BPVC Sect. X non-metallic-appendix convention applied conservatively: UTS/4.0 brittle static (18 MPa), UTS/6.0 creep (12 MPa) for 1000 h at 30 C; buckling SF 4.0 on external collapse.

Envelope: 150 mm ID x 10 mm wall x 900 mm overall, 200 mm OD x 15 mm thick flanges (inside 220 x 220 x 930 mm).

Load cases.
- LC1 proof: 300 kPa gauge internal at 20 C (1.5x MAOP) for 10 min, all ports sealed.
- LC2 operating + gravity: 200 kPa gauge internal at 30 C with column self-weight + 16 kg water + 7 kg wet GAC, top flange fixed vertically.
- LC3 backwash surge: 0 to 250 kPa internal in 0.5 s during flow reversal (evaluated quasi-statically).
- Plus a packed-bed CFD on LC2 steady flow (superficial-velocity max/mean <= 1.15, total drop <= 25 kPa) and a vacuum-collapse buckling check at -100 kPa gauge.

prompt.title: Acrylic PFAS adsorption column benchmark
prompt.brief: Single-piece cast PMMA column 150 ID x 900 L with integral flanges and 3 sample ports; PFAS GAC adsorption at 10 L/min; MAOP 200 kPa.

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Benchtop rig with low-flow pumps; no significant dynamic load.
exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Near-isothermal, only derate to 30 C for creep.

out_of_scope_but_real_world_needed: PMMA crazing from solvents in mine water
